counters.description: a really good taliyah especially with crit build can mess you up, you have to make sure not to dash with in her rocks because if you do you will instantly get cced. the game is still playable against her you can still it's just that her kit messes you up make sure to focus against her.

this champion is really hard to play against as belveth because she can knock you up into one shotting and she also has true damage. also her ultimate really messes you up since she goes underground and you cant do damage with ur e against her during it. make sure to play around the fact that she can one shot you level 6 and don't get knocked up
his alot of cc usually a pain in the ass but if you can dodge it you should be fine, really hard to play against if behind
also has a lot of cc just make sure you be careful of his cc and pick good fights
always ban this champ hes really broken rn and counters you hard

synergies.description: he can front line really well with you and also target cc with you
he can front line really well with you and also target cc with you
